flows.name: Send (USDC Base)
flows.notes: Reached the send confirmation route, but the confirmation remained on loading skeletons after repeated waits for the confirm button.

flows.name: Dapp connect
flows.notes: Connected https://metamask.github.io/test-dapp/ and captured the connect confirmation.

flows.name: Network switch to Base
flows.notes: Selected Base Mainnet in the dapp-internal network picker; dapp displayed CURRENT NETWORK: BASE MAINNET.

flows.name: Dapp send tx
flows.notes: The exact Send EIP 1559 Without Gas control was present in the dapp DOM but hidden/disabled. The visible Send fallback did not open a MetaMask notification.

flows.name: Dapp batch tx (cancelled)
flows.notes: Clicked EIP-5792 Send Calls, but no MetaMask notification appeared before timeout, so there was no confirmation to screenshot or cancel.

flows.name: Personal sign + verify
flows.notes: Captured the signature confirmation, confirmed it, and ran the dapp Verify action.

flows.name: Permit signature + verify
flows.notes: Captured the permit confirmation, acknowledged the security warning, confirmed it, and ran the dapp Verify action.

flows.name: Typed data v4 + verify
flows.notes: Captured the queued typed data v4 confirmation, confirmed it, and ran the dapp Verify action.

flows.name: Seaport bulkorder
flows.notes: Captured and confirmed the Seaport BulkOrder typed data confirmation.

flows.name: Sign In With Ethereum
flows.notes: Captured and confirmed the SIWE signature confirmation.

flows.name: Perps deposit (cancelled)
flows.notes: Perps was enabled and the tutorial was dismissed. Add funds did not open a confirmation after repeated targeting attempts and wait-for-notification timed out.

flows.name: mUSD conversion (cancelled)
flows.notes: The Get mUSD banner opened education once, but Get started did not advance to a conversion confirmation. After skipping education, the Get mUSD CTA was a no-op and the stablecoin detail page had no Convert entry.
